title: Neymar
desc: Kunjava and his mate welcome a tail-wagging friend called Neymar, only to find their lives thrown into complete disarray.

title: Lollipop
desc: Franco, who runs an automobile workshop, and his sister Jenny, a college student, share a very strong bond. Matters take a turn when Franco falls in love with Jenny's enemy.

title: Geetha Govindam
desc: Vijay Govind, a young lecturer in a college, wishes to get married at the earliest. He tries to woo Geetha, an independent and a level-headed woman, who is not easy to convince.

title: Seelabathi
desc: Seelabhati along with her mother visits a remote village where she starts working as a computer teacher. When some students mysteriously disappear, the villagers start blaming her educational course.

title: Heaven
desc: Peter Kurishinkal investigates a series of murders while silently grieving a personal loss, using both intuition and forensics to piece together the truth.

title: Arjun Reddy
desc: Arjun Reddy Deshmukh, a young surgeon with functioning alcoholism and a furious temper, spirals into self-destruction when he learns that his girlfriend is marrying another man.

title: Aabhaasam
desc: Passengers on a bus attempt to deal with each other's quirks and personalities while travelling from Bengaluru to Trivandrum.

title: Janamaithri
desc: The officers at Paramedu police station start an innovative campaign to reach out to the residents of the area. However, things do not go as planned and they land in all sorts of trouble.

title: Oru Indian Pranayakadha
desc: Aymanam Sidharthan, a leader of the youth wing of a local political party, hopes to succeed in politics. Irene, an Indo-Canadian woman making a documentary on Indian politics, is smitten with him.

title: RRR
desc: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Swarna Kaduva
desc: Rini, the right-hand of a corrupt businessman, begins to become greedy for money. He asks his boss to help him settle down with a jewellery shop, but fate has other plans for him.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey
desc: Jayabharathi, an ambitious girl, strives to complete her education. However, when her parents marry her off, she attempts to carve an identity for herself.

title: Sandesam
desc: Raghavan Nair, a retired station master, returns home to spend time with his wife and children. Things take a turn when his son's political differences create a rift in the family.
